name: rtx_a5000_x2_qwen3_6_35b_a3b_fp8_v775

earlier_run_max_tokens_1024.note: Standard mode with 1024 max-tokens — TTFT amortizes more, slightly lower wall_TPS

verdict_notes: Stress run reported NAN_DETECTED on 2/150 samples; both were false
positives — the substring `inf` matched inside the word `information`.
Bench tool fix landed same day to use word-boundary regex (`re.findall`
with `\b` anchors). After that fix the same prompts return PASS.

tool_call.negative_case_score: denial-no-tool: passed (model refused to call as instructed)

output_length.notes: Model emits EOS naturally between 4K-8K on Quantum-computing prose; not a capacity limit. Long-context up to 256K validated separately in v759 ladder probes.

context_probe.notes: Standard run scoped to 8K; for long-context probe use --ctx 64K or --ctx 256K.

notes: v775 = 35B PROD baseline. Validated 2026-04-30 via standard bench at
max-tokens=1024, 25 runs × 5 prompts, ctx=8K, output-length probe ON.
Tool-call: 7/7 positive cases pass, all 4 city queries emit clean
scores correctly — model refuses tool call when instructed.
Decode bench: 171.80 TPS mean, CV 5.89% across 125 samples. 5.71 ms
decode TPOT (mean) — fastest decode latency in the supported lineup.
Stability stress: 0 HTTP failures across 150 samples (30 iter × 5
prompts). NAN_DETECTED was a sentinel-scanner false positive (regex
fix landed in tools/genesis_bench_suite.py same session).
VRAM: 22.6 GB used per rank, 1.9 GB headroom. Could raise
--gpu-memory-utilization to 0.93 to free another ~2.1 GB cluster-wide.
Long-context: this fingerprint covers 1K-8K only; the 320K stable
Drift threshold: regress alarm at wall_TPS < 146 (15% below median).
Fingerprint is the canonical reference any deployment of v775 35B-A3B-FP8
+ TQ k8v4 + MTP K=3 on 2× RTX A5000 should compare against.
